name: Four Field Kono
author: Traditional (Korea) / AGP port
description: Four Field Kono (네밭고누), a traditional Korean capture game on a full 4x4 board. The signature move: jump one of your own pieces over an orthogonally-adjacent friendly piece to land on (and capture) an opponent piece directly beyond. Because the board starts completely full, the first move must be a capturing jump. You may not jump onto an empty cell, over an enemy, or over a gap. A player wins when the opponent can no longer make any capturing jump (reduced to one piece, or all remaining pieces immobilized).
